name: Boundless DV8 From BMIC
summary: A stainless steel hybrid vaporiser for dry herb with a wide temperature range and zirconia mouthpiece, for patients who want a robust, serviceable device.
description: The Boundless DV8 is a metal-bodied hybrid vaporiser with a wide 31C to 240C temperature range and a 0.6g ceramic chamber for fuller sessions. Heat-up takes 20-25 seconds, the zirconia drip-tip keeps vapour cool, and the LiPo battery and USB-C charging keep it serviceable. It comes well-equipped with spare screens, storage pods and a stir tool. An OLED screen and vibration alerts make it easy to use. The stainless steel build is durable but adds weight. Suits patients who want a tough, well-stocked dry-herb device, though the warranty on the unit is shorter at 1 year.

specs.label: Warranty
specs.value: 1 years on the unit; 90 days on battery
